name: cassia senna
title: cassia senna benefits
description: Cassia senna improves liver function by enhancing the liver's ability to detoxify and metabolize toxins, thereby maintaining optimal liver health. This benefit is important as a healthy liver is essential for removing waste products, regulating hormones, and synthesizing essential proteins, and its dysfunction can lead to conditions such as cirrhosis, jaundice, and liver failure.
